title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot compete with AI on raw knowledge and that true intelligence in the age of AI is defined by curiosity, human judgment, and the ability to discover new talent like Ramanujan. He advocates for redefining what we teach when knowledge is freely available through machines.
